title: Robin Hood and the Pirates
writer: Edoardo Anton, Leo Bomba, Marcello Ciorciolini
actors: Lex Barker, Jocelyn Lane, Rossana Rory
plot: On his way to (or from) the Crusades, Robin Hood is shipwrecked but saved by pirates who plan to return him home in order to ransom him to his father. The pirates' ship, however, sinks in a storm. Robin washes ashore (in England?)...
